allow: PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.WorkingSet -gt 100MB } | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Host "Frontend stopped")

PowerShell($routes = @\('/home', '/inbox', '/pending-approval', '/approved', '/archive', '/others', '/tracker'\); foreach \($r in $routes\) { try { $res = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$r" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "$r => $\($res.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "$r => ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(100,$_.Exception.Message.Length\)\)\)" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/home" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; $r.Content.Substring\(0,500\) } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode; $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\).Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(1000,$reader.ReadToEnd\(\).Length\)\) })

PowerShell($req = [System.Net.WebRequest]::Create\("http://localhost:3000/home"\); $req.AllowAutoRedirect = $false; try { $resp = $req.GetResponse\(\); Write-Host "Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; $stream = $resp.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\).Substring\(0, 500\) } catch [System.Net.WebException] { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; Write-Host "Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; $stream = $resp.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\).Substring\(0, 2000\) })

PowerShell($routes = @\('/home', '/others', '/tracker', '/inbox'\); foreach \($r in $routes\) { try { $res = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$r" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "$r => $\($res.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "$r => $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)" } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Get-Content "C:\\Users\\HP\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\nextjs_output.log" -Tail 40)

PowerShell($routes = @\('/', '/home', '/inbox', '/pending-approval', '/approved', '/archive', '/others', '/tracker', '/login'\); foreach \($r in $routes\) { try { $res = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$r" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "$r => $\($res.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "$r => $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)" } })

PowerShell($routes = @\('/workflows', '/pending-approval', '/home'\); foreach \($r in $routes\) { $res = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$r" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "$r => $\($res.StatusCode\)" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Get-Content "C:\\Users\\HP\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\nextjs_output.log" -Tail 20)
PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -eq "" } | Select-Object Id, CPU, WorkingSet | Format-Table)

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id \(netstat -ano | findstr ":4000 " | Select-String "LISTENING" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '\\s+'\)[-1] }\) -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Set-Location "C:\\Users\\HP\\SES_Automator\\backend"; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c node src/index.js > C:\\Users\\HP\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\backend_output.log 2>&1" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; Get-Content "C:\\Users\\HP\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\backend_output.log")

PowerShell($pid = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1; if \($pid\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force; "Killed PID $pid" } else { "Nothing on port 4000" })

PowerShell($proc = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; "Killed PID $proc" } else { "Nothing on port 4000" })
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:4000/health' -TimeoutSec 5; $r } catch { "Not up yet: $_" })
PowerShell(Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "cmd" -ArgumentList "/c cd C:\\Users\\HP\\SES_Automator\\backend && npm run dev > C:\\Users\\HP\\SES_Automator\\backend\\server.log 2>&1" -PassThru)

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -First 1; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; "Killed PID $proc on port 4000" } else { "Port 4000 free" })
PowerShell("Killed stale node. Run 'npm run dev' in backend directory.")

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { "Backend running on port 4000 \(PID $\($conn.OwningProcess\)\)" } else { "Port 4000 not listening — start the backend with: cd C:\\Users\\HP\\SES_Automator\\backend && npm run dev" })

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = \(Get-Content C:\\Users\\HP\\SES_Automator\\backend\\.env | Select-String "^DB_PASSWORD=\(.+\)" | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches[0].Groups[1].Value }\); $env:PGUSER = \(Get-Content C:\\Users\\HP\\SES_Automator\\backend\\.env | Select-String "^DB_USER=\(.+\)" | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches[0].Groups[1].Value }\); $env:PGDATABASE = \(Get-Content C:\\Users\\HP\\SES_Automator\\backend\\.env | Select-String "^DB_NAME=\(.+\)" | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches[0].Groups[1].Value }\); $env:PGHOST = \(Get-Content C:\\Users\\HP\\SES_Automator\\backend\\.env | Select-String "^DB_HOST=\(.+\)" | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches[0].Groups[1].Value }\); Write-Host "DB: $env:PGDATABASE @ $env:PGHOST as $env:PGUSER")
PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = 'ses_password'; psql -U ses_user -h localhost -d ses_automator -c "UPDATE workflows SET status = 'in_progress' WHERE id = 'CE-202605-004' RETURNING id, status;" 2>&1)

PowerShell($conn = netstat -ano | findstr ":4000 " | findstr "LISTENING"; if \($conn\) { $pid = \($conn -split '\\s+'\)[-1]; Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force; Write-Host "Stopped PID $pid on port 4000" } else { Write-Host "Nothing running on port 4000" })

PowerShell($conn = netstat -ano | findstr ":4000 " | findstr "LISTENING"; if \($conn\) { $procId = \($conn -split '\\s+'\)[-1]; Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force; Write-Host "Stopped PID $procId" } else { Write-Host "Nothing running on port 4000" })
PowerShell(Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $_.Id }; netstat -ano | findstr "4000")
